title: Tweaked Totem
description: Smaller firstperson totem, smaller & lowered pop animation, & square pop particles, for better visibility in every fight.
body:
# Tweaked Totem

> Stop going blind every time you survive. Totem stays out of your way — in hand and on pop.


## ✦ What it does

| Change | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Smaller first-person totem** | Scaled to 40% — visible in the corner without blocking your view |
| **Smaller pop animation** | Shrunk and shifted down so you can still see during a fight |
| **Square pop particles** | Crisp pixel-square particles in gold & green instead of the default swirls |


## ✦ Why you'll want it

The vanilla totem covers a huge chunk of your screen when held and completely blinds you on pop. In PvP — especially crystal PvP — that one second of blindness costs you everything. Tweaked Totem keeps the totem functional and visible without removing it entirely. You still know it popped. You can still see.


## ✦ Compatibility

- **Minecraft Java Edition** — 1.21.11
- No mods required — pure resource pack
- Works on Vanilla, Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge
- Compatible with most custom totem texture packs

> ⚠️ The totem will appear slightly smaller in item frames — this is an unavoidable side effect of the smaller pop animation.

---

*No shaders. No mods. No fuss.*
*And don't forget to leave a 💕 — it helps others find it!*
